Client tracker preview for Big Little Paws

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Big Little Paws: A single workspace that walks each pup from New Dog Inquiry Form through meet-and-greet, free trial day, and booked stay without bouncing between texts and Gmail.

Start the $99 setup See what is included

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

All new dogs begin with a complimentary Meet & Greet, All dogs must be up to date on Rabies, Bordetella (kennel cough), and DHPP vaccinations, Drop-offs and pick-ups must be scheduled in advance, Holiday bookings may require a 7 day notice cancellation window

Today ops snapshot Reservation board Biscuit Y. Record Reservation + Vaccine View Stay Timing + Holiday Window Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every new dog tracked from inquiry form to first booked stay in one record
  • Vaccine records (Rabies, Bordetella, DHPP) and flea/tick status visible at a glance
  • Drop-off / pick-up windows and holiday cancellation rules live next to each reservation

1. Today ops snapshot

Today ops snapshot

Who is on the property, who is being picked up, and who is next in the meet-and-greet queue — so you can glance once instead of checking four threads.

Open this view

2. Reservation board

Reservation board

Every pup moves through Inquiry -> Meet-and-greet -> Trial day -> Booked -> Checked-in -> Pickup recap, matching your real flow.

Open this view

3. Biscuit Y. Record

Biscuit Y. Record

One page per pup with owner contact, vaccines on file (Rabies / Bordetella / DHPP / flea-tick), feeding, meds, meet-and-greet notes, and booking history.

Open this view

4. Reservation + Vaccine View

Reservation + Vaccine View

Per-booking view: dates, drop-off / pick-up windows, rate, vaccine status, special-care notes, and which cancellation rule is in effect (24h / 72h / 7-day holiday).

Open this view

5. Stay Timing + Holiday Window

Stay Timing + Holiday Window

Calendar of stays, meet-and-greets, and trial days — with holiday windows and 7-day cancel rules shaded in so nothing gets double-booked.

Open this view

6. Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

After check-out: photo recap, gentle repeat-booking nudge, 60-day vaccine-expiration flag, and daycare-pack renewal reminders.

Open this view

7. Setup Map

Setup Map

How the packet plugs into your current flow: the New Dog Inquiry Form, meet-and-greet text threads, Gmail, and vaccine-PDF handoffs.
